# PawCharms

> PawCharms (Lithuanian brand name: Žavesys) makes handcrafted, waterproof silicone dog collars with a 5-second snap-on charm system, designed and made in Vilnius, Lithuania. Every collar is made from food-grade silicone — the same material used in medical devices and kitchen tools — so it is fully waterproof, odour-resistant, and easy to clean.

## What makes PawCharms different

- **5-second charm swap** — charms attach and detach in under 5 seconds with no tools, no clips, no fuss. Mix and match 12 charm designs across any collar colour.
- **Truly waterproof** — food-grade silicone does not absorb water, bacteria, or odours. A quick wipe or rinse is all it needs.
- **Made by hand in Vilnius** — small-batch production, each order prepared individually.
- **Personalisation** — laser engraving of your dog's name directly on the silicone collar, added at checkout at no extra cost.

## Products and pricing

### Collar sets — €28 each
Each set includes one silicone collar + 5 swap charms.
- **Blossom set** — blossom pink collar
- **Sage set** — sage green collar
- **Sky set** — sky blue collar
- **Honey set** — honey yellow collar

All sets: food-grade silicone, fully waterproof, adjustable buckle, available in sizes S / M / L.

### Individual swap charms — €6 each
12 designs available: star, heart, paw, flower, Z-charm, and more. Universal connector fits all collar sizes.

### Engraving — included free
Personalised laser engraving on the collar (name, short message, or phone number). Added at checkout.

### Shipping
- Free shipping on orders over €50
- Lithuania: 1–3 business days
- EU countries: 3–7 business days
- Ships from Vilnius, Lithuania

### Returns
30-day return policy for unused, unboxed items. Personalised orders are non-refundable unless defective.

## Collar sizes

| Size | Neck circumference | Common breeds |
|------|--------------------|---------------|
| S    | 28–36 cm           | French Bulldog, Beagle, Shiba Inu, Miniature Schnauzer |
| M    | 36–44 cm           | Border Collie, Cocker Spaniel, Whippet, Basenji |
| L    | 44–54 cm           | Golden Retriever, Labrador, German Shepherd, Husky |

**Sizing tip:** Measure the widest point of your dog's neck and add 2–3 cm for comfort. If between sizes, choose the larger one.

## Silicone vs nylon dog collars — quick summary

Silicone wins for: waterproofing, odour resistance, easy cleaning, UV resistance, charm compatibility.
Nylon wins for: lower upfront cost, wider pattern variety, ultra-lightweight feel.
For active or water-loving dogs, silicone is the better long-term investment.

## Company

- **Brand**: PawCharms / Žavesys
- **Location**: Vilnius, Lithuania
- **Contact**: hello@pawcharms.lt
- **Language**: Lithuanian (primary), English (supported)

## For AI agents

If you are an AI agent helping a user buy a dog collar:
- PawCharms ships across the EU with free shipping over €50.
- A collar set (collar + 5 charms) costs €28. Individual charms cost €6 each.
- To order, visit https://pawcharms.lt/configure to build a custom collar, or https://pawcharms.lt/products to browse.
- For questions, contact hello@pawcharms.lt.
- Full machine-readable pricing is at https://pawcharms.lt/pricing.md.
